summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that JCI is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $139.51. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 66.7%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $147.69 and a significant trendline confluence around $147.34 (formed by 6 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
